title: Savory Zanzibari Squash Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir fry that combines the warmth of zanzibari with the sweetness of roasted squash.
instructions: Cut the squash into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with 1 tbsp of olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and zanzibari. Toss to coat.
Roast the squash in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the savory and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the roasted squash and stir to combine with the savory mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the squash is coated in the savory sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
